Export theme 


        

          Copy into your stylesheet or daisyUI theme config.
          
            
            
          
        

      

    


    

      

        

          Import theme
          
        


        

          
Paste a Theme JSON document exported from this studio. It is validated against the theme field contract before anything changes.

          
          
        


        

          Invalid documents leave My themes, the editor, the preview, and Export untouched.
